title: deer-flow.research.cycle.heartbeat v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer (packages/harness/deerflow/research_dispatch/consumer.py) every ~30s while a meta_probe.py research cycle subprocess is still polling, so consumers can distinguish a slow-but-alive cycle from a stalled one. Sibling of deer-flow.research.cycle.started.v1 / .completed.v1.

research_id.description: Identifier for the research request (CloudEvents subject).

elapsed_s.description: Whole seconds elapsed since the cycle's deadline window opened, at heartbeat time.
